name: small metal room
description: I'm in a small metal room
hints: You are in an alien complex. The force field is significant - examine your surroundings carefully.
The force field may be the only way out. You need to interact with it, but be careful.
GO FIELD to pass through the force field into the next area. This will set you on the path through the alien ship.
notes: Small metal room in the alien complex. Going through the force field leads to room 2 (metal room with control console). This is an early room in the alien ship.
